title: Exact Finite Simplicial Cohomology Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite simplicial cohomology coboundary QF_UF/Alethe regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Finite replay computes a coboundary value over F2, while the malformed row claims the opposite value for the same edge.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional cohomology rows only when they add distinct cup-product, torsion, universal-coefficient, or proof-reconstruction pressure; keep general cohomology theory in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed finite simplicial complexes and F2 cochains as deterministic finite-set and finite-linear obligations.
Replay coboundary values from simplex faces rather than trusting listed cochain tables.
Replay cohomology dimensions by exact F2 matrix-rank checks on the finite coboundary matrices.
Route the bad coboundary row through checked QF_UF/Alethe evidence after finite replay identifies the value mismatch.
Keep cup products, universal coefficients, de Rham comparison, sheaf cohomology, and cohomology invariance under Lean horizon until formal routes exist.
